name: python3-django-filters
title: python3-django-filters
summary: filter Django QuerySets based on user selections (Python3)
description:
filter Django QuerySets based on user selections (Python3)
Django-filter is a generic, reusable application to alleviate some of the more
mundane bits of view code. Specifically allowing the users to filter down a
queryset based on a model’s fields and displaying the form to let them do this.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-filters because filter Django QuerySets based on user selections (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-filters as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-filters with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-filters --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
